positive: A stylized, high-contrast depiction of a mythical forest guardian, rendered as a sleek, powerful silhouette. The guardian should be comprised of interwoven natural elements: ancient roots, glowing bioluminescent fungi, and intertwined jungle foliage. It stands centered, majestic, and symmetrical, viewed against a minimalist backdrop of deep teal and midnight blue. The overall composition must be highly graphic and scalable, perfect for an apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Deco illustration meets Japanese woodblock print etching. Lighting: Strong backlighting to emphasize the silhouette details. Composition: Centered, circular flow, limited palette with pops of emerald green and gold accents. Highly detailed line art, vector art quality.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, lowres, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, copyright, graffiti, sloppy edges, gradient, solid background, abstract, human figure, logo, brand
